factors: If the farmer was heading toward one basket but switched to that which the wizard added an apple, I chose the sentence that the wizard caused the farmer to choose that basket (by adding the apple, making it more desirable to the farmer). If the farmer chose the basket he was originally heading toward, regardless if the wizard added an apple or did nothing, I chose that the wizard had no effect, because the farmer was already going to choose that basket before the wizard's decision.
